hero.headline: Inheriting the Legacy. Defining the Future.
hero.subheadline: We are Successors, an F1 in Schools team building precision engineering, measurable partner value, and high-impact STEM outreach.

home.sponsorStripTitle: Trusted by sponsors powering our race to nationals.

highlights.title: National Finals Momentum
highlights.description: Race-ready development roadmap aligned to the UAE F1 in Schools National Finals timeline.

engineeringSnapshot.detail: Autodesk Fusion 360 aerodynamic modeling with rapid iteration loops.
Ansys CFD studies to cut drag, stabilize flow, and improve race performance.
Lunyee 3018 Pro Ultra CNC machining and controlled finishing workflow.

outreachSnapshot.title: Outreach That Moves Beyond The Track
outreachSnapshot.description: Our enterprise program links competition excellence with educational impact and sponsor storytelling.
bullets: Charity Run and STEM campaign activations
AI and innovation workshops for students

teamPage.subtitle: A focused group of engineers, designers, and operators executing at race pace.

engineeringPage.title: Engineering
engineeringPage.subtitle: From concept to launch, every iteration is measurable, testable, and race-focused.

timeline.title: CAD Sculpting
timeline.description: Aerodynamic chassis geometry is shaped for minimum drag and stable centerline behavior.

timeline.title: CFD Validation
timeline.description: Pressure maps and streamline behavior guide parameter-level refinements.

timeline.title: CNC Production
timeline.description: Final validated model is machined, finished, and prepped for race conditions.

gallery.title: Concept Alpha
gallery.caption: Initial surface exploration focusing on minimizing frontal area and optimizing straight-line speed.

gallery.title: Concept Beta
gallery.caption: Independent structural design prioritizing flow separation control and minimizing turbulent wake.

gallery.title: Concept Gamma
gallery.caption: Foundational CAD model exploring weight reduction strategies within strict F1 in Schools regulations.

gallery.title: Beta Simulation
gallery.caption: Ansys simulation evaluating flow separation and wake size to validate our aerodynamic efficiency.

gallery.title: Gamma Simulation
gallery.caption: Testing drag coefficients and pressure distribution to optimize aerodynamic track performance.

outreach.title: Outreach and Impact
outreach.description: Our outreach portfolio combines competitive engineering with accessible STEM learning.

faqs.question: How fast can a sponsor activation go live?
faqs.answer: Within one campaign cycle after alignment, we can launch integrated content and event visibility.

faqs.question: What does a partner receive beyond logo placement?
faqs.answer: Narrative-rich media content, outreach integration, and performance-led positioning tied to our competition journey.

faqs.question: Can sponsorship include education initiatives?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can co-design workshops and student engagement initiatives to align with your CSR priorities.

sponsorsPage.title: Sponsors
sponsorsPage.subtitle: Our sponsors are part of the build, the race, and the story.
sponsorsPage.ctaDescription: Connect with us to tailor a sponsorship package that aligns with your growth goals.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your partnership, media, or collaboration goals.
contactPage.intro: Use the form to generate a prefilled email. No portals, no friction, direct contact only.
contactPage.socialPrompt: Prefer social channels? Reach out through our platforms while we finalize full media kits.
